name: Lostface
description:
“Where do you think I come from?”

Hey hey!! Me again! Yes, I have heard about everything going on with this app; and it had even restricted my access on my phone for a few hours, but it’s safe to say that I won’t be moving any time soon. Rest well knowing that your most forgotten about, unfortunate writer will be staying with her requests still open.

Anyways! It’s time to come back to my roots with another Lostface bot. I haven’t drawn him in a good year now, so for my first drawing of him again I might as well make a celebratory bot, too.

You may notice some changes in behavior with him, but I’m trying not to deviate too much from what he originally is.

creator: Ozzyfacec642
